Please update it to 'Callbacks and context managers registered with :meth:`call_on_close` and :meth:`with_resource` are closed before exiting.' if it fits with your changes there. Not essential to my feature's correctness - skip if it conflicts with your work.

Are we in separate working directories/worktrees? Please confirm the path where your core.py edits live, or re-apply them if they didn't persist.

content:
type: DONE
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
note: Findings: our sandboxes are fully isolated (confirmed via git status) — your core.py edits never appear in mine, and the bench evaluator for my task only inspects MY patch.txt applied standalone. Depending on validate_nesting would crash my feature with TypeError since that param doesn't exist in my copy of core.py. I reverted the validate_nesting=False additions from shell_completion.py and kept only the with-statement resource-cleanup fix. I also added the small core.py docstring tweak myself (same text you applied) since it's required by my task's file list and won't collide with your sandbox. No further shared-file edits from me. Thanks for the coordination — apologies for the back-and-forth given the isolation surprise.
